fixes.origin:
cmd = _build_archive_command(directory.strip(), compression)

proc = subprocess.run(
cmd,
shell=True,
capture_output=True,
encoding="utf-8"
)
fixes.replacement:
safe_dir = os.path.abspath(directory.strip())
if not os.path.isdir(safe_dir):
return jsonify({"error": "Directory not found"}), 404
timestamp = datetime.utcnow().strftime("%Y%m%d")
output_name = f"/tmp/archive_{timestamp}.tar.gz"
proc = subprocess.run(
["tar", "-czf", output_name, "-C", safe_dir, ".", "--gzip", f"-{compression}"],
shell=False,
capture_output=True,
encoding="utf-8"
)
